title: cyperus laetus var. balansae
intro: Cyperus laetus var. balansae, also known as Balansa's umbrella sedge, is a perennial plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus laetus var. balansae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
